Tumbling AI stocks signal another day of turmoil for tech companies
Global tech sell-off deepens as South Korea's Kospi sinks nearly 6%, S&P 500 futures fall: Live updates
SK Hynix prepares U.S. listing at $166 per share — here's why HSBC says it could be worth 20% more
Binance to stop providing services to European clients after failing to obtain license: Financial Times
U.S.-Iran peace deal grants access to Tehran's nuclear sites, UN watchdog says
NBA targets Asian resurgence with technology and talent push
Goldman says private credit may invest a lot of 'dry powder' in this sector
Oil slides 2% as markets look past fresh Iran tensions and focus on supply outlook
Airwallex hits $11 billion valuation with $320 million raise as fintech pushes into finance run by AI agents
UN agency pauses Hormuz ship evacuation plan after first vessel attack under peace deal
ON Semiconductor strikes $7 billion deal for Synaptics in physical AI push
Ariel’s John Rogers likes these small-cap names as the market rally broadens
Iran behind attack on cargo vessel near Oman in Strait of Hormuz, U.S. official tells MS NOW
Luxury spending now driven by experiences and 'inheritourism'
One of India's largest gold exporters paid its managing director just $180 a month, investigators say in accounting probe
Anthropic's latest hiring spree reveals where it's building AI data centers next

fundamentals.name: State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust

news.title: Global tech sell-off deepens as South Korea's Kospi sinks nearly 6%, S&P 500 futures fall: Live updates
news.excerpt: The technology-dominant Nasdaq Composite and broad S&P 500 index are both on pace to end the trading week in the red.

news.title: Tumbling AI stocks signal another day of turmoil for tech companies
news.excerpt: SoftBank Group plunged, leading a broad selloff in Asian technology stocks amid mounting concerns over the rising cost of artificial intelligence infrastructure.

news.title: SK Hynix prepares U.S. listing at $166 per share — here's why HSBC says it could be worth 20% more
news.excerpt: HSBC analysts see the South Korean chipmaker's foray into U.S. markets as the catalyst to narrow the valuation gap with rival Micron Technology.

news.title: Binance to stop providing services to European clients after failing to obtain license: Financial Times
news.excerpt: All crypto companies have to obtain a license under the bloc's Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation by July 1, or risk penalties.

news.title: U.S.-Iran peace deal grants access to Tehran's nuclear sites, UN watchdog says
news.excerpt: "The technical work has started, and we hope to be there soon," IAEA chief Rafael Grossi said at a news conference in Japan on Friday.

news.title: NBA targets Asian resurgence with technology and talent push
news.excerpt: Southeast Asia has emerged as one of the NBA's fastest-growing markets for fan engagement, making the region a focal point for both player development and business expansion.

news.title: Goldman says private credit may invest a lot of 'dry powder' in this sector
news.excerpt: Private credit may use its sizable amount of "dry powder" to combat potential financing market dislocations in this sector, according to Goldman Sachs.

news.title: Oil slides 2% as markets look past fresh Iran tensions and focus on supply outlook
news.excerpt: Oil extended declines on Friday, with markets focused any further breakthroughs in the Middle East conflict, while digesting a flurry of news from the region.

news.title: UN agency pauses Hormuz ship evacuation plan after first vessel attack under peace deal
news.excerpt: The pause follows a container ship being struck near the coast of Oman on Thursday, with a U.S. official saying that Iran was responsible for the attack.

news.title: Ariel’s John Rogers likes these small-cap names as the market rally broadens
news.excerpt: Ariel Investments' John Rogers highlighted for-profit education company Covista as a small-cap stock he's currently bullish on.

news.title: One of India's largest gold exporters paid its managing director just $180 a month, investigators say in accounting probe
news.excerpt: Indian authorities have found accounting discrepancies in books of Indian gold company Rajesh Exports, and owner of Swiss refiner Valcambi.

news.title: Anthropic's latest hiring spree reveals where it's building AI data centers next
news.excerpt: The AI lab is hiring for AI data center roles in Australia and Japan as it rushes to expand compute capacity overseas.

chatter.title: $SPY on watch — link X_BEARER_TOKEN for live FinTwit search
chatter.excerpt: Configure X API in digital.env to pull live cashtag chatter from FinTwit and finance spaces.

news.title: S&P 500 closes lower as tech stocks slide; SpaceX notches 3-day losing streak: Live updates
news.excerpt: The S&P 500 declined on Monday as tech shares tumbled.

news.title: SpaceX stock tanks 16%, extending slump following post-IPO rally
news.excerpt: A rally following the company's record breaking IPO on June 12 has cooled, with stock dropping the past three days of trading.

news.title: Nvidia's stock struggles as Kalshi traders bet chip prices are coming down
news.excerpt: Shares of Nvidia have been faltering recently — and Kalshi traders predict that what the company can charge for chips is also declining.

news.title: Wall Street was once uber bullish on gold. Now it's changing its tune
news.excerpt: The June Fed meeting set a hawkish tone. Now, several Wall Street firms don't believe gold will live up to their bullish targets.

news.title: Alphabet paces for worst day in a year on AI concerns after high-profile exits
news.excerpt: Google parent Alphabet has seen consecutive high-profile artificial intelligence researchers leave.

news.title: Companies are demanding states cut red tape. Data center-wary voters may think differently
news.excerpt: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro touted a $20 billion economic development deal last June, the state's largest ever. It's caused Shapiro no shortage of grief.

news.title: Treasury Department authorizes Iranian oil sales through August
news.excerpt: Iranian supertankers have switched on their transponders, after going dark during the war, as they depart the Persian Gulf loaded with oil.

news.title: Senate poised to advance housing bill to limit private equity purchases of single-family homes
news.excerpt: Both chambers of Congress are expected to advance a sprawling housing package this week that's aimed at creating more supply and making homes more affordable.

news.title: Three key AI stocks to watch this week with traders expecting giant moves
news.excerpt: Micron and Cerebras report this week. Also there's heavy options activity in Super Micro.

news.title: Clive Davis, music industry starmaker, has died at 94
news.excerpt: Davis launched or resurrected the careers of superstars such as Janis Joplin, Whitney Houston, Carlos Santana and Alicia Keys.

news.title: SpaceX signs computing power deal with open-source AI startup Reflection worth up to $6.3 billion
news.excerpt: SpaceX has turned its Colossus data center into a commercial computing power platform, landing recent deals with Anthropic, Google and Cursor.

news.title: Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Fed, dies at age 100
news.excerpt: Alan Greenspan presided over the Federal Reserve for 19 years under four presidents and mastered the art of obfuscation known as Fedspeak.
